summary: Architect phase complete. 5-file change map locked: main.dart (fail-fast assert), Info.plist (literal MBXAccessToken — $(MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN) is NOT wired in xcconfig), route_map_preview.dart (_mapLoadError + reuse existing placeholder), live_map_widget.dart (new onMapError callback param), live_map_body.dart (SnackBar via ScaffoldMessenger). Verified Mapbox 2.23.1 API: parameter is onMapLoadErrorListener (not onMapLoadError); typedef OnMapLoadErrorListener takes MapLoadingErrorEventData. One decision flip from PRD: use literal pk token in Info.plist instead of $(MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN) build var — rationale and alternative documented.
